title: Session
description: An authenticated user session returned by Nhost Auth sign-in and sign-up operations.

accessToken.description: Short-lived JSON Web Token (JWT) for authorizing API requests.

accessTokenExpiresIn.description: Number of seconds until the access token expires.

refreshToken.description: Long-lived refresh token used to obtain new access tokens.

refreshTokenId.description: Unique identifier of the refresh token record.

email.description: Primary email address of the user.

avatarUrl.description: URL of the user's avatar image.

locale.description: Preferred locale of the user (BCP 47 language tag).

emailVerified.description: Whether the user's email address has been verified.

phoneNumberVerified.description: Whether the user's phone number has been verified.

defaultRole.description: The default Hasura role assigned to this user's JWT.

allowedRoles.description: All Hasura roles the user is permitted to assume.

isAnonymous.description: Whether the user signed in anonymously.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user account was last updated.

activeMfaType.description: Active multi-factor authentication type, or null if MFA is disabled.

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON metadata attached to the user.
